verdict.note: live browser: context menu = rename/select…/close; select… enters mode pre-ticking clicked row (1 selected), clicking another row → 2 selected, delete enabled only ≥1; cancel restores New/Search toprow, nothing closed

live browser: delete opens ONE confirm titled 'delete 2 sessions?' (count, not per-session). Confirm cancelled — NOT fired on the 5 live worktrees; the per-id close reuses the exact POST /api/sessions/:id/close proven by session-rename's single close
